name: The Fool
image_prompt: A young trader leaping off a cliff of price charts, a bindle of rolled commodity contracts over one shoulder, dawn sky behind them, colorful hot air balloons rising
macro_mapping_zh: 風險偏好開啟 / 新週期啟動

name: The Magician
image_prompt: A central banker in robes holding a wand above an altar spread with oil barrels, gold bars, wheat sheaves, and copper coils, currency symbols orbiting overhead
macro_mapping_zh: 央行全能 / 流動性憑空造就

name: The High Priestess
image_prompt: A veiled figure seated between two columns—one marked BULL, one BEAR—holding a scroll of undisclosed inventory data, moonlit commodities exchange behind her
macro_mapping_zh: 隱藏資訊 / 價格發現待定

name: The Empress
image_prompt: A fertile goddess enthroned amid overflowing grain silos, oil derricks blooming like flowers, and a rising price ticker vine, golden harvest light everywhere
macro_mapping_zh: 通貨膨脹 / 大宗商品超級週期

name: The Emperor
image_prompt: An iron-fisted emperor on a throne of stacked interest rate announcements, holding a scepter shaped like a rate hike chart, cold stone fortress backdrop
macro_mapping_zh: 升息 / 貨幣緊縮

name: The Hierophant
image_prompt: A robed high priest presiding over an OPEC assembly table, blessing barrels of crude oil, ministers bowing in ornate Middle Eastern hall
macro_mapping_zh: OPEC+ 紀律 / 卡特爾正統

name: The Lovers
image_prompt: Two commodity traders shaking hands beneath a glowing angel made of price-correlation matrices, gold and oil charts mirroring each other in background
macro_mapping_zh: 貿易協定 / 市場相關性走高

name: The Chariot
image_prompt: A triumphant trader riding a chariot pulled by a black bear and white bull in harness, speeding along an upward-sloping chart axis highway

name: Strength
image_prompt: A calm figure gently holding open the jaws of a lion made of crude oil futures contracts, strength through composure, long horizon sunrise behind
macro_mapping_zh: 長期結構性需求 / 耐心資本

name: The Hermit
image_prompt: A solitary figure at the peak of a mountain of deleveraged positions, lantern glowing dimly, price charts descending into mist below

name: Wheel of Fortune
image_prompt: A great wheel of commodity charts spinning—oil, gold, corn, copper—creatures riding up and down its rim as markets rotate, fates written in candlesticks
macro_mapping_zh: 供給衝擊 / 週期反轉

name: Justice
image_prompt: A blindfolded figure holding scales perfectly balanced with an oil barrel on one side and a gold bar on the other, courthouse of commodity regulators behind
macro_mapping_zh: 法規再平衡 / 市場修正

name: The Hanged Man
image_prompt: A trader hanging upside down from a derrick scaffold, markets paused, oil barrels and grain sacks suspended mid-fall around them, eerie calm
macro_mapping_zh: 衰退 / 需求破壞

name: Death
image_prompt: A skeleton knight riding through a commodities trading floor at close of day, old regime charts crumbling, new green-energy sprouts emerging from ashes
macro_mapping_zh: 政策易轍 / 週期終結

name: Temperance
image_prompt: An angelic figure pouring liquidity between two beakers—one labeled growth, one labeled inflation—standing on a riverbank of steady economic flow
macro_mapping_zh: 軟著陸 / 受控放緩

name: The Devil
image_prompt: A horned figure enthroned above two traders chained to desks piled with leveraged futures positions, oil and metal chains binding them, flickering trading screens
macro_mapping_zh: 槓桿 / 商品成癮

name: The Tower
image_prompt: A tower of stacked commodity exchange servers struck by lightning, traders leaping from windows as charts go vertical, chaos and price discovery in freefall
macro_mapping_zh: 波動率飆升 / 黑天鵝

name: The Star
image_prompt: A figure kneeling at a river of quantitative easing, pouring water onto barren commodity fields as stars—each a different market ticker—light up the night sky
macro_mapping_zh: 復甦 / 流動性回歸

name: The Moon
image_prompt: A full moon reflected on an oil slick sea, two wolves howling at diverging price paths, a crayfish emerging from speculative froth below

name: The Sun

name: Judgement

name: The World
